name: powerbi-modeling-codex
description: Codex plugin for operating Power BI semantic models through the official Power BI Modeling MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect and edit Power BI semantic models from Codex
interface.longDescription: Provides a Codex skill and local MCP wiring for full Power BI Modeling MCP operations, including connection, model metadata, tables, columns, measures, relationships, DAX queries, partitions, and governance objects.
defaultPrompt: Connect to my PBIX in Power BI Desktop and list tables/columns.
Create or update a DAX measure using measure_operations.
Validate model changes and summarize what was modified.
